content.body:
Add Go structs for all MRP v0 wire-protocol events and 47 table-driven
tests that marshal each struct to JSON and validate it against the
schemas in .github/mrp/schemas/ using github.com/santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v5.
Covers valid/minimal/optional cases and invalid cases (missing required
fields, wrong enum values, wrong event const) for all 7 schema files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: test(transponder): add MRP v0 JSON schema validation tests (#78)
content.summary:
